channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Massie signals future political ambitions after primary loss: 'I won't be going away silently'
item.description: After losing the GOP primary to Trump-backed challenger Ed Gallrein in Kentucky's 4th District, Rep. Thomas Massie suggests he is open to further political involvement.

item.title: Democratic senator's visit to detention center during anti-ICE protests does not go as planned
Gold Star widow requests photos of her husband's grave at Arlington Cemetery, then something remarkable occurs
RedState Sports Report: A look back at a better, bygone era
